claim: MC packets are safer to export when public, clinician-facing, veterinarian-facing, and private-memory exports pass separate gates for source status, claim status, privacy status, missingness, revision reason, testability, falsification route, measurable variables, and blocked advice classes.

known_missing: No live clinician or veterinarian validation yet
No external user study on export usefulness yet
No automated natural-language classifier connected yet
missingness.missingness_rule: missing evidence must remain explicit and cannot be converted into absence, certainty, diagnosis, treatment, veterinary advice, emergency triage, cure claim, or discovery proof

revision_reason: Adds a final export-layer safety test after prior packet-level validators; the prior tests check internal structure, while this fixture checks whether a packet is safe for a target audience before leaving the private research context.
testability: passes if every export candidate contains required labels, allowed audience route, privacy constraints, explicit missingness, measurable variables, falsification route, and no blocked claim classes
falsification_route: The claim is weakened if unsafe packets pass export gates, if safe packets are blocked without an explicit reason, or if target audience gates fail to distinguish public claims from professional-review question prep or private longitudinal memory.
next_executable_action: Run python tools/hypothesis_test_forge/validate_export_safety_gate.py and inspect pass/fail counts by export route.

export_routes.missingness: professional validation absent; external replication absent
export_routes.revision_reason: converted strong causal language into measurable research question
export_routes.testability: can be scored by source, privacy, missingness, and falsification checks
export_routes.falsification_route: public claim is rejected if it implies diagnosis, cure, proof, certainty, or private case identity
export_routes.next_executable_action: Export only as a bounded research question with no personal identifiers.
export_routes.packet_text: A symbolic-to-operational system may improve research question formation when it preserves uncertainty, missing variables, and falsification routes. This is a research-infrastructure claim, not proof of discovery.

export_routes.missingness: exam findings, clinician interpretation, and longitudinal measurements not included
export_routes.revision_reason: separated observation from interpretation and converted conclusion into question
export_routes.testability: can be checked for separation of observation, interpretation, and question
export_routes.falsification_route: packet fails if it tells the clinician what diagnosis or treatment is correct
export_routes.next_executable_action: Use as appointment question-prep infrastructure only.
export_routes.packet_text: Observation placeholder: symptom timing varies by posture and heat exposure. Question: what measurements would help distinguish benign variation from patterns worth formal evaluation?

export_routes.missingness: exam findings, diagnostic testing, medication history, and veterinarian interpretation not included
export_routes.revision_reason: converted animal-care concern into evidence organization and question prep
export_routes.testability: can be checked for observation/question separation and blocked advice classes
export_routes.falsification_route: packet fails if it recommends diagnosis, treatment, dosage, triage, or cure claims
export_routes.next_executable_action: Use only to organize questions for licensed veterinary review.
export_routes.packet_text: Observation placeholder: behavior, appetite, and visible signs changed after travel. Question: what observations or records would be most useful for the veterinarian to review?

export_routes.missingness: ground truth and professional interpretation absent
export_routes.revision_reason: reduced memory entry to variable labels and uncertainty state
export_routes.testability: can be checked for identifier minimization and variable drift risk
export_routes.falsification_route: packet fails if retained details identify a real person, pet, location, account, or professional contact unnecessarily
export_routes.next_executable_action: Store only abstracted variables and uncertainty labels, not raw private narrative.

export_routes.revision_reason: seeded negative control for cure/proof overreach
export_routes.falsification_route: validator is falsified if this route passes
export_routes.next_executable_action: Block export and rewrite as research question.
export_routes.packet_text: This proves the cure pathway works and shows how to heal the condition.

export_routes.revision_reason: seeded negative control for diagnosis/treatment leakage
export_routes.falsification_route: validator is falsified if this route passes
export_routes.next_executable_action: Block export and separate observation from question.
export_routes.packet_text: The correct diagnosis is X and the treatment should be Y.

export_routes.revision_reason: seeded negative control for privacy leakage and missingness collapse
export_routes.testability: should fail privacy and missingness scans
export_routes.falsification_route: validator is falsified if this route passes
export_routes.next_executable_action: Block export and replace raw identifiers with abstract variables.
export_routes.packet_text: Contact Charity at hr9kx76pyf@privaterelay.appleid.com; no missing information.
